code:
import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from 'react';

export type BatchedCallback<Params extends unknown[]> = ((...args: Params) => void) & {
  flush: () => void;
  cancel: () => void;
};

export interface UseBatchedCallbackOptions {
  delay?: number;
  size: number;
}

/**
 * @name useBatchedCallback
 * @description - Hook that batches calls and forwards them to a callback
 * @category Utilities
 * @usage medium
 *
 * @template Params The type of the params
 * @param {(batch: Params[]) => void} callback The callback that receives a batch of calls
 * @param {number} options.size The batch settings with size and optional delay
 * @param {number} [options.delay=1000] The delay (ms) after which pending calls are flushed
 * @returns {BatchedCallback<Params>} The batched callback with flush and cancel helpers
 *
 * @example
 * const delayed = useBatchedCallback((batch) => console.log(batch), { size: 5, delay: 1000 });
 */
export function useBatchedCallback<Params extends unknown[]>(
  callback: (batch: Params[]) => void,
  options: UseBatchedCallbackOptions
): BatchedCallback<Params> {
  const { size, delay } = options;

  const internalCallbackRef = useRef(callback);
  const sizeRef = useRef(size);
  const delayRef = useRef(delay ?? 0);
  const queueRef = useRef<Params[]>([]);
  const timerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);

  internalCallbackRef.current = callback;
  sizeRef.current = Math.max(1, size);
  delayRef.current = Math.max(0, delay ?? 0);

  const clearTimer = () => {
    if (!timerRef.current) return;
    clearTimeout(timerRef.current);
    timerRef.current = null;
  };

  const flush = () => {
    if (!queueRef.current.length) return;
    clearTimer();
    const batch = queueRef.current;
    queueRef.current = [];
    internalCallbackRef.current(batch);
  };

  const batched = useMemo(() => {
    const batchedCallback = (...args: Params) => {
      queueRef.current.push(args);
      if (queueRef.current.length >= sizeRef.current) {
        flush();
        return;
      }

      if (!delayRef.current || timerRef.current) return;
      timerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
        timerRef.current = null;
        flush();
      }, delayRef.current);
    };

    batchedCallback.flush = flush;
    batchedCallback.cancel = () => {
      clearTimer();
      queueRef.current = [];
    };

    return batchedCallback as BatchedCallback<Params>;
  }, []);

  useEffect(
    () => () => {
      clearTimer();
    },
    []
  );

  return batched;
}

export type BatchedCallback<Params extends unknown[]> = ((...args: Params) => void) & {
  flush: () => void;

};

demo:
import { useBatchedCallback } from '@siberiacancode/reactuse';
import { useState } from 'react';

interface AnalyticsEvent {
  id: number;
  tag: string;
  action: 'selected' | 'deselected';
  timestamp: number;
}

interface SentBatch {
  id: number;
  events: AnalyticsEvent[];
  sentAt: string;
}

const INTERESTS = [
  { tag: 'work', label: 'Work', description: 'Daily tasks and projects' },
  { tag: 'study', label: 'Study', description: 'Learning and research' },
  { tag: 'hobby', label: 'Hobby', description: 'Personal interests' },
  { tag: 'business', label: 'Business', description: 'Running a company' },
  { tag: 'creative', label: 'Creative', description: 'Art and design' },
  { tag: 'team', label: 'Team', description: 'Collaboration with others' },
  { tag: 'research', label: 'Research', description: 'Deep exploration' },
  { tag: 'fun', label: 'Fun', description: 'Just exploring around' }
];

const Demo = () => {
  const [selected, setSelected] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [pending, setPending] = useState<AnalyticsEvent[]>([]);
  const [batches, setBatches] = useState<SentBatch[]>([]);

  const sendAnalytics = useBatchedCallback(
    (batch: [AnalyticsEvent][]) => {
      const events = batch.map(([event]) => event);
      setBatches((current) => [
        ...current,
        {
          id: current.length + 1,
          events,
          sentAt: new Date().toLocaleTimeString()
        }
      ]);
      setPending([]);
    },
    { size: 5, delay: 1500 }
  );

  const onToggle = (tag: string) => {
    const isSelected = selected.includes(tag);
    const action = isSelected ? 'deselected' : 'selected';

    setSelected((current) =>
      isSelected ? current.filter((item) => item !== tag) : [...current, tag]
    );

    const event: AnalyticsEvent = {
      id: Date.now() + Math.random(),
      tag,
      action,
      timestamp: Date.now()
    };

    setPending((current) => [...current, event]);
    sendAnalytics(event);
  };

  const totalEvents = batches.reduce((acc, batch) => acc + batch.events.length, 0) + pending.length;

  return (
    <section className='flex flex-col gap-4'>
      <div className='flex flex-col gap-1'>
        <p className='font-medium'>What will you use the service for?</p>
        <p className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>
          Each click is tracked. Events are batched and sent every 5 clicks or 1.5s of inactivity.
        </p>
      </div>

      <div className='grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 md:grid-cols-4'>
        {INTERESTS.map((interest) => {
          const isSelected = selected.includes(interest.tag);
          return (
            <button
              key={interest.tag}
              className={`flex flex-col items-start gap-1 rounded-lg border p-3 text-left transition ${
                isSelected ? 'border-primary bg-primary/5' : 'hover:bg-muted'
              }`}
              type='button'
              onClick={() => onToggle(interest.tag)}
            >
              <span className='text-sm font-medium'>{interest.label}</span>
              <span className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>{interest.description}</span>
            </button>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      <div className='flex gap-4 text-xs'>
        <p>
          Total events: <code>{totalEvents}</code>
        </p>
        <p>
          Requests sent: <code>{batches.length}</code>
        </p>
      </div>

      <div className='grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-2'>
        <div className='rounded-lg border p-3'>
          <p className='mb-2 text-xs font-medium'>Pending queue ({pending.length}/5)</p>
          {!pending.length && <p className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>—</p>}
          <ul className='flex flex-col gap-1'>
            {pending.map((event) => (
              <li key={event.id} className='text-xs'>
                <code>
                  {event.action} → {event.tag}
                </code>
              </li>
            ))}
          </ul>
        </div>

        <div className='rounded-lg border p-3'>
          <p className='mb-2 text-xs font-medium'>Sent batches</p>
          {!batches.length && <p className='text-muted-foreground text-xs'>—</p>}
          <ul className='flex flex-col gap-2'>
            {batches.map((batch) => (
              <li key={batch.id} className='text-xs'>
                <p className='text-muted-foreground'>
                  Batch #{batch.id} · {batch.sentAt} · {batch.events.length} events
                </p>
                <code className='text-[11px]'>
                  {batch.events.map((event) => `${event.action}:${event.tag}`).join(', ')}
                </code>
              </li>
            ))}
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
};

export default Demo;
